title: euphorbia esula subsp. tristis
intro: Euphorbia esula subsp. tristis, also known as the bitter candy root or bitter cypress, is a subspecies of the Euphorbia esula plant, which belongs to the spurge family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues, due to its bitter compounds and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia esula subsp. tristis include its ability to soothe stomach upset, reduce inflammation, and even act as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the roots in water, and it has also been used in herbal remedies and supplements to leverage its medicinal properties.
